title: FORTE CARGO - Generic Functions
description: Script to call to php generic functions ONLY USED BY FORTE CARGO
config:
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y curl jq && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN composer require "swiftmailer/swiftmailer:^6.0"
RUN rm -f /CQP_Generic_Functions.php
RUN curl -X "GET" \
  "https://forteunderwriters.dev.cloud.processmaker.net/api/1.0/scripts/1020?21" \
  -H "accept: application/json" \
